source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local support surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
distilled_thesis: Outstretched hands are the recipient-interface the route names as necessary for giving to become actual bestowal.
